- Excellent PNG compression: proprietary algorithm often beats generic tools on

3. Squoosh — Best for single-image quality control
Squoosh is Google's open-source browser-based image compression tool. It runs en
Benchmark result
The 4.2MB JPEG compressed to 810KB at quality 80 (81% reduction) — the best JPEG
- Best compression quality: MozJPEG and AVIF encoders produce the smallest files

Benchmark result
The 4.2MB JPEG compressed to 1.4MB at default settings (67% reduction) — accepta
- Multi-tool suite: compress, resize, crop, convert, and watermark from one plat

- Server-based — your images are uploaded to iLoveIMG's servers for processing
- Slower than browser-based tools due to upload/download round trip
Best for: occasional users who need a mix of image tasks (not just compression)

- Best WordPress integration: automatic optimization on upload, bulk optimizatio

- Server-based processing — images are uploaded to Compressor.io's servers
